room.name: Embankment Underground Station
room.description: The air is damp and the roar of flowing water fills your ears. Pipes and conduits run overhead. Somewhere above is the Thames Embankment.

room.name: the Miniplenty access tunnel
room.description: This is one way the Party brings in premium goods bartered from abroad. A reinforced door blocks the southern passage through to a stairwell leading to the Ministry. A painted slogan reads: "LESS IS MORE".

room.name: a Cold Storage Room
room.description: Rokws of refrigeration units line the frost covered walls of this low chamber. A few empty tins lie scattered on the floor.

room.name: a Contraband Store
room.description: The shelves are piled with dusty bottles of foreign liquor, chocolate wrappers, and packets of coffee marked 'INNER PARTY'. A sign on the wall warns: "THEFT IS PUNISHABLE BY DEATH."
